abilities.name: 습기
abilities.description: 누구도 폭발 할 수 없게 된다.

flavorTexts.text: When this Pokémon expands and contracts its wobbly body, the belly-button dynamo in its stomach produces a huge amount of electricity.
What appear to be eyeballs are actually organs for discharging the electricity generated by Bellibolt’s belly-button dynamo.
